results.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.28.
results.why: This pass is a light general cleanup aimed at tightening consistency without changing the deck’s core plan. [[Forest]] helps restore stable land counts, while [[Pawpatch Formation]], [[Eusocial Engineering]], [[Innkeeper's Talent]], and [[Stocking the Pantry]] consolidate into cleaner, more reliable role-players. The cuts trim weaker or less stable pieces so the list plays more smoothly at a focused power level.

raw.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.28.
raw.plan: This pass is a light general cleanup aimed at tightening consistency without changing the deck’s core plan. [[Forest]] helps restore stable land counts, while [[Pawpatch Formation]], [[Eusocial Engineering]], [[Innkeeper's Talent]], and [[Stocking the Pantry]] consolidate into cleaner, more reliable role-players. The cuts trim weaker or less stable pieces so the list plays more smoothly at a focused power level.
raw.why: This pass is a light general cleanup aimed at tightening consistency without changing the deck’s core plan. [[Forest]] helps restore stable land counts, while [[Pawpatch Formation]], [[Eusocial Engineering]], [[Innkeeper's Talent]], and [[Stocking the Pantry]] consolidate into cleaner, more reliable role-players. The cuts trim weaker or less stable pieces so the list plays more smoothly at a focused power level.

added.pawpatch formation: A fourth [[Pawpatch Formation]] reinforces a stable multi-copy core card.
added.eusocial engineering: [[Eusocial Engineering]] adds a focused new effect without pushing the deck into a new archetype.
added.forest: [[Forest]] restores mana stability and supports the deck’s land count.
added.innkeeper's talent: [[Innkeeper's Talent]] provides a more efficient, generally useful payoff piece.
added.stocking the pantry: [[Stocking the Pantry]] offers compact value that fits the deck’s general refinement pass.

removed.mirage mesa: A second [[Mirage Mesa]] is removed as part of the land cleanup.
removed.tolls of war: A second [[Tolls of War]] is removed to reduce clunkier draws.
removed.unfortunate accident: A second [[Unfortunate Accident]] leaves to open space for higher-quality refinement pieces.
removed.captivating cave: [[Captivating Cave]] is removed to simplify and stabilize the mana base.
removed.night market: [[Night Market]] is cut as a lower-priority utility land in this cleanup.

warnings: General cleanup restored land count stability for this constructed deck.
General cleanup guard preserved core multi-copy cards to avoid an archetype pivot.
General cleanup guard limited constructed cleanup to 2 new card names.
General cleanup guard limited this pass to 8 small swaps.
